sections.paragraph:
(from אַיָּל, “of” or “belonging to a stag”), [Ajalon, Aijalon], pr.n. of a place, so called from abounding in stags, like the Germ. Hirfchau, Hirfchfeld. This was the name-

(1) of a town of the Levites, in the tribe of Dan, Jos 10:12 19:42 21:24 Jud. 1:35 . [See Robinson, iii. 63.]-(2) a town in the tribe of Zebulon, Jud. 12:12 .
